## Test plan

- [ ] `bash scripts/verify.sh` passes locally
- [ ] All affected renderers run against `data/snapshots/` mock fixtures
- [ ] Hebrew strings reviewed for casual style (no literary/formal vocabulary)
- [ ] No em/en dashes added (use plain hyphen)
- [ ] `.env` not modified or committed
- [ ] No new API keys / secrets in tracked files
